title: Can PPF investors open multiple accounts in different banks? Rules explained
summary: The Public Provident Fund (PPF) is a government-backed savings scheme in India, offering 7.1% interest with tax benefits. Individuals can only maintain one account to prevent misuse of tax benefits.

title: Why rushing to file your income tax return (AY 2026–27) could be a mistake
summary: Modern tax compliance has transformed into an entirely data-driven process. Contemporary income tax returns are never evaluated independently

title: STCG vs LTCG: Difference between short-term and long-term capital gains tax, types of assets and rules explained
summary: Taxpayers who earn capital gains are required to report them when filing their income tax returns using the appropriate ITR form.

title: ITR filing: How NRIs and foreigners are taxed in India and why residential status matters
summary: Tax liability of individuals is influenced more by residential status than citizenship under Indian tax law. NRIs and foreign citizens may be taxed based on their days in India and income nature. Here's what you need to know.

title: Missed life insurance premium payments? Know when your policy may lapse and revival rules
summary: Life insurance provides financial protection for policyholders' families upon their death. Premiums can be paid regularly or as a lump sum. Here's when your policy lapses and ways to revive it among other details.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Key Lucknow meetings begin on 22 June — all you need to know
summary: 8th Pay Commission Update: The commission's Lucknow visit is scheduled for 22–23 June and appointment requests have to be submitted before 10 June. Check out the latest developments and how the fitment factor has risen from 1.86 to 2.57.&nbsp;

title: Income tax returns 2026-27: Should pensioners file ITR? Tax rules, forms and deductions explained
summary: Many retirees may believe that ITR filing is optional. Pension income is taxable, requiring ITR submission based on total income. ax rules, forms and deductions explained here.

title: How multiple credit card applications impact your CIBIL score and approval chances – explained
summary: Requesting an additional credit card requires strategic planning to enhance approval chances and protect financial health. Frequent applications can negatively impact credit scores, so stagger requests to minimise adverse effects while considering your credit history.

title: Smart financial planning tips for parents: SIPs, insurance, savings & child investment plans
summary: Financial planning for children includes SIP investments, term insurance, health cover, Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana, emergency savings and legal protection to secure a prosperous future for every family across the country.

title: EPFO to allow PF withdrawal via UPI soon: Here’s how instant EPF withdrawals will work
summary: EPFO will soon enable members to withdraw Provident Fund money via UPI, according to Union Labour Minister Mansukh Mandaviya. Here’s how instant EPF withdrawals will work.

title: US stocks today: Dow hits record high as Middle East hopes lift sentiment and Warsh takes Fed charge
summary: US stocks rose as Dow hit an intraday record and S&P 500 extended its winning streak to eight weeks, supported by strong earnings and hopes of easing Middle East tensions. Tech stocks gained after Lenovo results lifted Dell and HP. Bond yields eased while Kevin Warsh was sworn in as Fed chair.

title: US Fed chair Kevin Warsh says will be 'reform-oriented' at glitzy White House swearing-in
summary: New US Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh vowed to be "reform-oriented" as he was sworn in at the White House on Friday, with President Donald Trump insisting the central bank chief would be "totally independent." It is unusual for the chief of the Fed -- an independent non-partisan body that sets mo

title: Angst over rising cost of living pushes US consumer sentiment to record low
summary: US consumer sentiment fell to a record low in May as rising gasoline prices driven by the Iran war intensified cost-of-living pressures. Inflation expectations climbed sharply, especially among Republicans and independents, signalling growing economic dissatisfaction and posing risks to spending des

title: Jewellery retailer DP Abhushan posts 88% rise in PAT; revenue crosses Rs 4,000 crore
summary: DP Abhushan Ltd reported an impressive 88% surge in annual profit for FY26, reaching Rs 211.84 crore, driven by strong store demand and network expansion. Revenue grew 23% to Rs 4,070.33 crore, with EBITDA margins improving significantly. The company also expanded its showroom network to 12 outlets

title: Deepa Jewellers, Cotec Healthcare receive Sebi approval for IPOs
summary: Deepa Jewellers, a B2B hallmarked gold jewellery processor based in Hyderabad, and Cotec Healthcare, a pharmaceutical CDMO, both received SEBI approval for their IPOs. Deepa's IPO includes a Rs 250 crore fresh issue and an offer for sale by promoters.

title: Sebi bars seven entities in social media stock recommendations, alleges Rs 58 crore gains
summary: The market regulator Sebi barred seven individuals for allegedly generating Rs 58 crore in wrongful gains by using social media (including X) to disseminate stock recommendations. They allegedly traded ahead of their posts to profit from price movements in small and mid-cap stocks.

title: Central Bank of India shares tumble as government launches OFS
summary: Central Bank of India shares fell sharply after the government initiated an 8% stake sale through an offer for sale at a floor price of Rs 31. Investors reacted despite the lender reporting strong annual profit growth and healthy expansion in advances.

title: US Fed governor Chris Waller joins chorus calling for potential rate hikes
summary: US Federal Reserve Governor Chris Waller on Friday added his voice to a growing bloc of policymakers calling for the US central bank to indicate that its next move could be an interest rate hike. Three Fed regional presidents backed removing the easing bias language, while one governor backed an int

title: NTPC Green Energy Q4 Results: Cons PAT declines 15% YoY to Rs 197 crore despite 47% revenue uptick
summary: NTPC Green Energy's Q4 FY22 consolidated net profit fell 15% YoY to ₹197 crore despite a 47% revenue increase to ₹913 crore. The decline was caused by a 60% rise in expenses (₹713 crore). However, the profit surged 11X sequentially from the previous quarter.

title: First Carolina files for IPO as US bank listings heat up
summary: After a lull following the 2023 regional banking crisis, U.S. bank IPOs have mounted a strong comeback over the past ​year as investors look beyond earlier headwinds.
